description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Fragment (left side only). Location: Fustat. Dating: ca. 1128–38 CE, based on the active dates of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe and Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver (both of whom signed the document). In which Abū Zikrī b. Yosef ha-Kohen and the ḥaver Berakhot b. Aharon ha-Kohen ha-Jalīlī form a partnership agreement, in which Berakhot will act as an agent and take merchandise to Damascus. Signed by Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver (fl. 1128–1164), and validated by […] b. Natan he-Ḥaver, Ḥalfon b. Yosef ha-Kohen, Natan b. Shemuel, Avraham b. Shemaʿya and Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. The Abū Zikrī in this document may be identical with the Abū Zikrī Yehuda b. Yosef ha-Kohen in Bodl. MS heb. b 11/2 (a different partnership agreement). (Information in part from CUDL.) AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב ידו של חלפון ב. מנשה (פעיל 1100–1138 לספירה). שבר (צד שמאלי בלבד). מיקום: פוסטאט. תיארוך: כ-1128–1138 לספירה. אבו זכרי ב. יוסף הכהן והחבר ברכות ב. אהרן הכהן הג'ליל יוצרים הסכם שותפות שבו ברכות ייסע לדמשק כסוכן
